original_text:
### Tint Rules
- Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).
- Light Blue callout box: **70% tint**.
- Golden Sand callout box: **30% tint**.
- Wave top layers: **70% transparency**.
- No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.

effect.reserved_for: the four specified tints: campaign headline letter tint (opacity.headline.letter_tint_40 = 0.4), Light Blue callout box (opacity.callout.light_blue_70 = 0.7), Golden Sand callout box (opacity.callout.golden_sand_30 = 0.3), Wave top layer (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7)
effect.subject: tint/opacity values

quotes: No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.
Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).
No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.

rules.intent: Prevent uncontrolled tinting and keep opacity usage to approved values.
rules.rule_text: Tints are restricted to the four specified applications only: the campaign headline "D" and "M" letters use a ≈40% tint of the headline color (opacity.headline.letter_tint_40 = 0.4, in the Gold #ffc60a or Brand Blue #00529b colorway); the Light Blue callout box uses a 70% tint (opacity.callout.light_blue_70 = 0.7); the Golden Sand callout box uses a 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_30 = 0.3); and Wave top layers use 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7). No other ad-hoc tints are allowed — use palette values or these specified tints only.
